name: Saurav Raghuvanshi
title: Digital Cloud Solution Architect
subtitle: Azure · Generative AI · Cloud-Native · Startups & Unicorns
tagline: I help high-growth startups and unicorns build AI-powered, cloud-native platforms at scale.
availability: Open to speaking engagements & collaborations · Responds within 24h (IST)
summary: I'm a Digital Cloud Solution Architect at Microsoft, helping high-growth startups and unicorns harness the power of cloud and AI to build scalable, secure, and innovative solutions. My mission is to simplify complexity, accelerate value, and enable customers to achieve their boldest ambitions through technology.
aboutLong:
I specialize in designing cloud-native architectures and infusing AI into products to unlock new possibilities—from improving operational efficiency to creating intelligent, adaptive experiences. By combining technical depth with a growth mindset, I partner with founders and engineering leaders to modernize platforms, optimize investments, and drive long-term success.

Beyond customer engagements, I'm passionate about thought leadership and community building. I've led initiatives like Code Without Barriers and Azure Developer Community India, mentored developers, and delivered sessions on AI and cloud transformation. I believe diversity and inclusion fuel innovation—and I strive to create impact that goes beyond technology.
missionStatement: To simplify cloud and AI complexity, accelerate business value, and enable ambitious founders and engineering teams to build secure, scalable, and innovative products.
primaryCTA: Let's build scalable, AI-powered cloud platforms together
whatImKnownFor: Architecting secure, scalable, cloud-native platforms on Microsoft Azure for startups and unicorns
Designing AI-powered systems using Generative AI and Agentic AI — from prototype to production
Modernizing legacy platforms into resilient, cloud-native architectures with zero downtime
Optimizing cloud cost, security, reliability, and operational efficiency at scale
Acting as a trusted technical partner for founders and engineering leaders navigating cloud adoption
Delivering 70+ sessions on Azure and AI, training 30,000+ engineers and customers

testimonials.quote: Saurav's guidance helped us re-architect our platform for scale in record time. His ability to translate complex Azure architecture into actionable engineering decisions is rare. He thinks like a founder, not just an architect.
testimonials.author: Founder

testimonials.quote: The SupportIQ solution Saurav helped design genuinely changed how our team operates. Saving an hour per engineer per day compounded across the team is a massive productivity win. The ROI was immediate.
testimonials.author: Engineering Lead

testimonials.quote: Saurav ran the Cloud-Ready Academy program for our engineering cohort and the results were exceptional — 95% skills uplift, incredibly well-structured labs, and a genuine passion for helping developers grow.
testimonials.author: Program Manager

speaking.title: Building with Azure AI Foundry: From Prototype to Production
Agentic AI: Designing Autonomous Workflows on Azure

community.description: Leading community initiatives, organizing events, and driving Azure adoption among developers across India.
Organizing inclusive tech education events to make cloud and AI skills accessible to underrepresented communities.
Contributed to the AWS developer community with content, workshops, and peer knowledge sharing.
Mentoring early-stage founders and engineering teams on cloud architecture, AI adoption, and product scaling.

highlights: Architect and modernize cloud-native platforms for high-growth startups and digital natives
Design secure, scalable Azure solutions aligned to measurable business outcomes
Guide customers on AI adoption, cloud optimization, and platform modernization
Act as a trusted technical partner for founders and engineering leaders
Resolved 500+ production Azure issues across PaaS and cloud services
Delivered 70+ sessions on Azure and AI, training 30,000+ engineers and customers
Collaborated with product engineering on APIM Workspace and Copilot features
Served as SME for Microsoft Startups Hub, mentoring early-stage startups
